hypercolor

RGB lighting orchestration for Linux. Open source, Rust-powered, endlessly extensible.

Get Started Build an Effect GitHub

Three front doors

📚

Guide

Install the daemon, connect your first device, and light up your rig in minutes.

Start here →
🎨

Effects

Author HTML Canvas, WebGL, and audio-reactive effects with the TypeScript SDK.

Create →
🤖

Agents & MCP

Drive your lighting from AI agents over the MCP server: 16 tools, 5 resources.

Automate →

Go deeper

🎭

Studio

Compose your whole rig with the Scene, Zone, Layers, and Layout model.
🔌

Hardware

Razer, Corsair, ASUS, WLED, Hue, Nanoleaf, Govee, and more. One engine.
⚡

API

REST + WebSocket on :9420. A 60fps render loop in Rust, sub-millisecond latency.
